name: Angi Home Services Marketplace API
what_it_does: Angi (formerly Angie's List, IAC subsidiary) home services marketplace REST API for connecting homeowners with local service professionals for home improvement, repair, and maintenance. Enables AI agents to manage service request creation and contractor matching for home services booking automation, handle contractor profile and availability lookup for service pro discovery automation, access customer review and rating retrieval for service quality verification automation, retrieve project cost estimate and quote request for home improvement cost research automation, manage lead routing and service area targeting for contractor lead management automation, handle project status tracking and milestone management for home improvement project automation, access contractor background check and license verification status for contractor vetting automation, retrieve service category and skill matching for multi-trade home services automation, manage Angi Instant Book for real-time service scheduling for automated appointment booking, and integrate Angi with homeowner platforms, insurance claim services, and home warranty systems for embedded home services.
use_cases: Booking home services from homeowner platform agents
Matching contractors from project management agents
Verifying contractors from quality vetting agents
Estimating costs from home improvement research agents
not_for: Commercial property maintenance and facilities management
New home construction and developer services
best_when: A home warranty company, real estate platform, insurance carrier, or home technology company wanting AI agents to automate contractor matching, service booking, project cost estimation, and post-service review management through Angi's home services marketplace.
avoid_when: CONTRACTOR LICENSE AND INSURANCE VERIFICATION STATE REQUIREMENTS: Automated contractor matching via Angi must verify contractor state license and insurance currency for regulated trades (plumbing, electrical, HVAC, roofing); Angi conducts background checks but trade license verification by state varies; automated contractor commitment without state license verification creates homeowner liability if unlicensed contractor causes damage. TCPA CONSENT FOR HOMEOWNER LEAD DISTRIBUTION: Automated lead distribution via Angi to contractors involving homeowner phone number and contact information sharing requires TCPA-compliant consent for contractor outreach; automated lead sharing without documented consumer consent creates TCPA exposure for contractors. HOME WARRANTY CLAIM INTEGRATION SCOPE OF WORK ACCURACY: Automated home warranty claim contractor dispatch via Angi must accurately scope covered repairs; automated contractor authorization without home warranty coverage verification creates unauthorized work and warranty claim disputes.

auth.notes: Angi uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Denver, Colorado HQ. Angie's List founded 1995. HomeAdvisor founded 1998. Merged as ANGI Homeservices 2017. Rebranded Angi 2021. IAC subsidiary (NASDAQ: ANGI). 250,000+ service professionals. Angi Instant Book for real-time scheduling. Background checked and reviewed contractors. Categories: plumbing, HVAC, electrical, roofing, landscaping, cleaning, handyman. Competes with Thumbtack, TaskRabbit, and HomeStars for home services marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — lead-based pricing for service pros; API partnership for embedded integration
pricing.paid_tiers: Service pro: per-lead fee by category and market; homeowner: free browsing, fee for premium matching; API partnership: revenue share or per-booking fee
pricing.notes: Denver CO. NASDAQ: ANGI (IAC subsidiary). Per-lead pricing for service pros. Homeowner free browsing. API partnership via ANGI enterprise program. Revenue share for embedded integrations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; search and booking queries throttled; webhooks for booking and review events

known_agent_gotchas: CONTRACTOR LICENSE VERIFICATION STATE REQUIREMENT: Angi background checks verify criminal history but trade license currency varies by state; automated contractor matching for regulated trades (electrical, plumbing, HVAC, roofing) must include state-specific license verification before booking; automated booking of unlicensed contractor for permit-required work creates homeowner liability

LEAD DISTRIBUTION TCPA CONSENT DOCUMENTATION: Automated lead sharing from Angi to service pro network must document homeowner TCPA consent for contractor telephone contact; per-lead consent tracking is essential for TCPA class action defense; implement consent timestamp and opt-in mechanism before automated lead distribution

INSTANT BOOK CALENDAR AVAILABILITY REAL-TIME CHECK: Angi Instant Book scheduling depends on contractor real-time calendar availability; automated booking without real-time availability verification creates double-booking and contractor dispatch failure; check availability immediately before booking confirmation

SERVICE AREA GEOGRAPHIC MATCH: Automated contractor matching must verify service pro service area coverage for homeowner ZIP code; Angi service areas are defined by contractor configuration; automated booking with ZIP code outside contractor service area creates booking cancellation

REVIEW RESPONSE CONTENT POLICY: Automated contractor review response via Angi must comply with Angi community guidelines; automated response containing homeowner PII, dispute threats, or content policy violations creates Angi account flag

IAC PLATFORM STRATEGY CONTEXT: Angi is IAC/ANGI Homeservices subsidiary undergoing strategic positioning; validate Angi API program investment and partnership terms with ANGI enterprise team before deep integration investment; IAC portfolio rebalancing affects product roadmap
agent_readiness.security_notes: Home services marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Homeowner PII, contractor data, and service booking information.

security_score_components.security_notes: Home services. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Homeowner PII, contractor data, and project information.
